name: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc.
summary: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc. (BNED) operates college and university bookstores across the United States, providing physical and online retail services for course materials, general merchandise, and related products. The company offers affordable access course material programs including BNC First Day and First Day Complete, digital course materials through partnerships with VitalSource Technologies, and outsourced bookstore management services to higher education institutions.

products.name: BNC First Day
products.description: Affordable access course material program providing discounted textbooks and digital materials to students at partner institutions.

products.name: First Day Complete
products.description: Inclusive access course material model where students receive all required materials at reduced costs, with opt-out options.

products.name: Managed Bookstore Operations
products.description: Outsourced physical and online bookstore management services provided to colleges and universities.

products.name: Digital Course Materials
products.description: Digital textbook and course content delivery in partnership with VitalSource Technologies.

partnerships.description: Strategic service provider for digital course material delivery and distribution.
Strategic service provider relationship referred to as the F/L Relationship for retail fulfillment.
Strategic partner under the F/L Relationship for college merchandise and retail operations.
